\tzpentry{ID4222}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4222 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{B} = \vec{B}_{\text{irrotational}} + \vec{B}_{\text{solenoidal}} + \vec{B}_{\text{harmonic}} \end{equation}
